titleStmt.title: SII 30.181: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 181. (A.R. No. 257-B of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District Chandramauḷīśvara temple-on the east wall Rājēndra-Chōḷa II: year 8, day 95: 1060 A.D.

summary.p: Built in. It records that the peruṅkuṟi perumakkaḷ of Parākramasōlachaturvēdimaṅgalam received gold from the temple treasury and agreed to exempt the taxes on the land owned by the temple. The produce of the land were to be utilized for feeding the brāhmaṇas well versed in Vēdas and also for smearing the deity with oil and other ingredients. The sabhā also agreed to remit the taxes for the temple land. Sūryabhaṭṭaṉ and others figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Uṭaiyār śrīrājentradevaṟku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu nāḷ95 ṉāl jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu tāmar nāṭṭu parākkirama coḻac catuppetimaṅkalattup peruṅkuṟip perumakkaḷom I
bhaṣattu dvādeśiyum pūcam peṟṟa vicāḻakkiḻamai nāṉṟu nammur Uṭaiyār śrīpon=taiyuṭaiyār koyilile kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntupaṇip paṇiyāl paṇi
śrī pon=tay Uṭaiyār paṇṭārattup poṉkoṇṭattevarnilaṅkaḷil van=ta nellu sabhaiyome Iṟuppatāka Innellukku śantirātitavar vetamvalla nā
vakaḷai koyilile Ūṭṭavum Ivarppaṟiyalukku maṇṭayapaṭṭaṉ paṟiyalum maṇalpākkattu vatikku kiḻakku parameśvaravāykkālukku vaṭakku muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu kuḻi nānū
m sabhaiyome Iṟaiyiṟukka Itteva paṇṭārattup pon koṇṭu Iṟai nilattukku van=ta Iṟai Epperppaṭṭatum bhaiyo meyiṟukka I ttuppoka
meyppūccukku nittam Orupalaccan=taṇamum nittam kaḻañcu citāriyum cantrātittavar celvatāka I nivan=tam Iraṇṭu cantrātittavar celvatāka Ipparicu paṇippaṇiyāl pa
ṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom peruṅkuṟipperumakkaḷom sūriyabhaṭṭan ṉeḻuttu paṇiya nakaram coḻacceri kūṭalūr Ādikecuvapaṭṭanum muṭikoṇṭa coḻacceri paṟiyalūr
ṭanum rājentracoḻacceriyil tiruvekampakkiramavittanum paṇiyāl paṇikeṭṭeḻutinen [ Asva] trarāñcagraRead- trairājyakaṭikai madhyastaṉiva māṇṭār muvāyirattaṟu nūṟṟuvaneṉ
Ippaṭiaṟiven vaikāṉasaṉ gautaman keśuva paṭṭanen Ippaṭi Aṟiven Āḻiyaṉ kūttanen Ippaṭi Aṟivēn kucavan kommaṇa cipontaiyeṉ
Ippaṭi Aṟiven kollaṉ kupāli ponnayeṉ Ippaṭiaṟiven vaiguntan tiruvikkirama paṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiven kāśayapan kāmayapaṭṭanen
Ippaṭi Aṟiven taṭṭāṉ kaṇavaticeriyeṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiven paraśivan cuṟṟi Oṟṟiyen .
Digital edition of SII 30.181 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
